requirements_addressed: TestExtractVideoId covers all URL formats (standard, short, embed, mobile, bare ID, extra params)
TestExtractVideoIdErrors covers invalid URL and empty string raising InvalidURLError
TestYouTubeClient covers get_video_info success path with mocked _sync_get_info
TestYouTubeClient verifies video_id, title, has_captions, available_languages from mock
Duration formatting covers None, 45, 212, 3661 edge cases
No network calls - all yt-dlp mocked

completion_promises.criterion_text: TestExtractVideoId: standard URL, short URL, embed URL, mobile URL, bare ID, URL with extra params
completion_promises.evidence: TestExtractVideoId class contains 6 tests: test_standard_url, test_short_url, test_embed_url, test_mobile_url, test_bare_id, test_url_with_extra_params. All 6 pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: TestExtractVideoId: invalid URL raises InvalidURLError, empty string raises InvalidURLError
completion_promises.evidence: TestExtractVideoIdErrors class contains test_invalid_url_raises and test_empty_string_raises plus additional edge cases (whitespace-only, too short/long ID, non-YouTube site). All pass and verify InvalidURLError is raised.

completion_promises.criterion_text: TestYouTubeClient: get_video_info success path with mocked _sync_get_info
completion_promises.evidence: TestYouTubeClient.test_get_video_info_success patches _sync_get_info with a mock VideoInfo return value and verifies get_video_info returns a VideoInfo instance. Additionally test_sync_get_info_with_mocked_ytdlp tests the full _sync_get_info path with mocked yt_dlp.YoutubeDL. All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: TestYouTubeClient: verifies video_id, title, has_captions, available_languages from mock
completion_promises.evidence: Four dedicated tests verify individual fields: test_video_id_from_mock, test_title_from_mock, test_has_captions_from_mock, test_available_languages_from_mock. Each patches _sync_get_info and asserts the specific field. All pass.

TestFormatDuration class has 7 tests covering all specified cases: test_none_returns_zero (None -> '0:00'), test_seconds_only (45 -> '0:45'), test_minutes_and_seconds (212 -> '3:32'), test_hours_minutes_seconds (3661 -> '1:01:01'), plus zero, exactly-one-hour, and exactly-one-minute. All pass.
pytest tests/unit/test_video_info.py -v shows 27 passed, 0 failed. Full suite (86 tests) also passes with 99% coverage.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No network calls in unit tests (all yt-dlp mocked)
completion_promises.evidence: All tests use unittest.mock.patch to mock _sync_get_info or yt_dlp.YoutubeDL. No real yt-dlp or network calls are made. Tests complete in 0.13s, confirming no network I/O.
